message:
fix: set BEADS_TEST_MODE in daemon test setupTestStore for DB isolation

setupTestStore creates beads stores via beadsdk.Open, which connects to the
shared Dolt SQL server. Without BEADS_TEST_MODE=1, all stores default to
database name "beads", causing event leakage between tests. With it, each
store gets a unique database name derived from its temp directory path.

Fixes gt--u8h (pre-existing test failures in internal/daemon on main).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@ import (
 // Skips if unavailable. Caller must run cleanup when done.
 func setupTestStore(t *testing.T) (beadsdk.Storage, func()) {
 	t.Helper()
+	t.Setenv("BEADS_TEST_MODE", "1")
 	dir := t.TempDir()
 	beadsDir := filepath.Join(dir, ".beads")
 	doltPath := filepath.Join(beadsDir, "dolt")
